text: I feel like I am in a modern, purposeful space dedicated to the exchange of knowledge. The glass walls and organized seating in the first scene give a sense of openness but also separation—an invitation to enter but also an awareness of boundaries. The vibrant, boldly colored wall of the second scene awakens my curiosity about research and development, while the electronic displays remind me of the seamless intermesh of human intellect and technology. Here, I feel observed yet also immersed—somewhat detached, cautiously reflective, yet pulled towards the promise of insight and discovery.
